Fictional Northstar Card Services is advertising the Northstar Everyday Cash Card.
New personal cardmembers can earn a $200 cash bonus after spending $1,000 on purchases in the first 90 days after account opening.
The card has a $0 annual fee and runs on the Visa network.
Offer is public and must be submitted by December 31, 2026.
Cash bonus posts 8 to 12 weeks after the qualifying spend requirement is met.
